---
title: "Template Course"
subtitle: "Week title"
format:
  live-revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    brand: ../_brand.yml
    theme: ../hevs.scss
    show-slide-number: all
    preview-links: auto
    logo: https://www.hevs.ch/_nuxt/img/logo_hesso.9af1d79.svg
    footer: "{{< var title>}}"
    header-logo: "/img/exit-left.svg"
    header-logo-link: "/{{< var folder>}}/Week2/"
filters:
  - reveal-header
---

## Slide 1 Title

- Point 1
- Point 2


## Images

![Example img](img/example.webp)


## Interactive Code

```{pyodide}
#| exercise: ex_1

# square each number
for x in range(5):
  print(______)
```

[More documentation on Live Code](https://r-wasm.github.io/quarto-live/)

## Line Highlighting

```{.python code-line-numbers="6-8"}
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

r = np.arange(0, 2, 0.01)
theta = 2 * np.pi * r
fig, ax = plt.subplots(subplot_kw={'projection': 'polar'})
ax.plot(theta, r)
ax.set_rticks([0.5, 1, 1.5, 2])
ax.grid(True)
plt.show()
```


## Line Higlighting with animation

```{.python code-line-numbers="|6|9"}
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

r = np.arange(0, 2, 0.01)
theta = 2 * np.pi * r
fig, ax = plt.subplots(subplot_kw={'projection': 'polar'})
ax.plot(theta, r)
ax.set_rticks([0.5, 1, 1.5, 2])
ax.grid(True)
plt.show()
```

## Multiple columns

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
Left column
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
Right column
:::

::::


## Aside 

- Green ^[A footnote]
- Brown
- Purple

::: aside
Some additional commentary of more peripheral interest.
:::

## Iframe

<iframe allowfullscreen frameborder="0" height="100%" mozallowfullscreen style="min-width: 500px; min-height: 355px" src="https://app.wooclap.com/events/TDLGXL/questions/690b2ee5f285fa1af30e2001" width="100%"></iframe>

Full screen example next page


## {background-iframe="https://app.wooclap.com/events/TDLGXL/questions/690b2ee5f285fa1af30e2001" background-interactive="true"}
